intro.title: Production Lines & Equipment
intro.description: Buyers in mature markets care about process discipline. When you scale from 500 units to 50,000 units, you need the product to stay the same. We use automated and semi-automated lines to ensure consistency.

items.title: Assembly Fixtures
items.description: Fit controls and jigs for repeatable installation, reducing operator error.

items.title: ESD Protection
items.description: Static control flooring and wrist straps for electronic component handling.

items.title: Functional Testing
items.description: Test checks designed around real failure causes, not just appearance.

items.title: Final Packing Check
items.description: Packing verification to prevent shipping damage and receiving errors.

highlight.title: Why It Matters
highlight.description: This reduces variation, rework, and customer complaints - helping your SKU stay profitable at scale.

primary.title: Request a Process Flow Snapshot
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical process view and next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
